specific_mechanism: Waggle dance: forager bee encodes distance/direction of nectar source as dance-spectrum; hive allocates forager attention across spectrum
llm_application: LLM attention waggle: each retrieval encodes direction/distance to relevant context as attention-spectrum; model allocates attention across spectrum.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes apiculture spectral-allocation mapping as proposed.
